free_text: Production rates of neutrons in soils due to natural
Argonne Van de Graaf tandem accelerator.
Thick targets, about 0.32 cm in thickness and 1.9 cm
in diameter, were mounted on a mechanical holder made
of aluminum, which enabled easy and rapid change of
targets without loss of vacuum. The targets used were
a quartz disk (SiO2), Al, Mg, and Fe metal disks, and
tightly compressed pellets of analytically pure
The long counter consisted of a 3He
proportional counter inside a directional paraffin
Relative neutron yields in the forward direction for
six energies, ranging from 4.8 to 8.8 MeV, were
determined by using a long counter 12.7 cm from the
target. Yields are normalized to yield of aluminum:
